title: Dental Prosthesis Technology Mission and Vision
content:
Dental Prosthesis Technology Mission and Vision

Mission

To train “Health Technicians” who adhere to the moral values that give importance to public health that will meet the needs of our country in the field of dental prosthesis by adhering to the rules required by qualified, competent and modern professional knowledge.

Vision

To educate respected staff who have reached the international level of knowledge in the field of Dental Prosthetic Technology and preferred in the public and private sectors. To provide graduates with general health knowledge who can easily use dental prosthesis devices and produce practical solutions to the dental problems around them.
